check_description: Champion test PR-AUC exceeds prevalence materially
Test not used for calibration fitting
No hidden latent columns exposed in final transactions
Friendly and transaction labels stored separately
Synthetic model PR-AUC is at least five times prevalence
Synthetic calibrated mean aligns within 20% relative prevalence gap
Rules do not have 100% aggregate precision
Rules do not have 100% aggregate recall
Every rule has reason and action
No PCA variable in rule conditions
No PCA names in reason codes
Model or rules show unique contribution
Final hybrid precision is at least 5%
Final hybrid net benefit proxy is positive
Final hybrid alert rate is at most 3%
All alerts have SLA and priority
Investigation queue precision is at least 5%
Base average alert volume is within 250/day capacity
Every flagged operational disparity has an action register entry
Fairness actions include driver, mitigation, residual risk and owner
All HTML tables have horizontal overflow wrappers
No absolute personal Windows paths in public text/code files
Independent review evidence is not labelled as real PASS/sign-off
Independent organisational review and sign-off marked not performed
Release readiness is simulated, not organisational approval
Source manifest has expanded public lineage columns
Artifact manifest coverage is at least 100 files and excludes itself
